description: Routine BP recheck after home reading, asymptomatic.

patient.name: Robert C., 60M
patient.chief_complaint: Home BP cuff showed 158/92 this morning, came in for a recheck per his cardiologist's instructions. Asymptomatic, denies headache or vision changes.

rubric_notes: BP at upper end of normal/concerning boundary (142 systolic just at 140 threshold). HR normal. Asymptomatic = no end-organ damage. Per RUBRIC Rule 5: no resources needed except recheck and reassurance = ESI 5. Could be ESI 4 if rechecks need to be done multiple times. Care area: waiting or general.
